instruction: Help me note down the project budget status

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Project'
ws['B1'] = 'Budget(10K CNY)'
ws['C1'] = 'Used(10K CNY)'
ws['A2'] = 'Website Redesign'
ws['B2'] = 30
ws['C2'] = 18
ws['A3'] = 'App Development'
ws['B3'] = 120
ws['C3'] = 85
ws['A4'] = 'Data Platform'
ws['B4'] = 80
ws['C4'] = 62
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/project_budget.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me note down the project budget status

Calculate the budget utilization rate for App Development (Used/Budget) from /home/user/Desktop/project_budget.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/budget_memo.txt: 'App Development Budget Utilization: 70.8%', save
